summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NightOwl Parents website. Backend 100% functional (15/15 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working with session persistence issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Users get logged out during navigation between pages
ui_bugs.symptoms: User redirected to login page when navigating from dashboard to other sections

integration_issues.issue: Cannot fully test due to session logout during navigation

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero and features
Chat rooms page shows available rooms
Backend API - All 15 endpoints (100% pass rate)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue causing users to be logged out during navigation. The authentication works correctly, but session tokens/cookies are not being maintained properly between page transitions, causing users to be redirected to login page when navigating from dashboard to other sections.
